nasb.text: In the fifty-second year of Azariah king of Judah, Pekah son of Remaliah became king over Israel in Samaria, and reigned twenty years.

esv.text: In the fifty-second year of Azariah king of Judah, Pekah the son of Remaliah began to reign over Israel in Samaria, and he reigned twenty years.

cnv.text: 猶大王亞撒利雅在位第五十二年，利瑪利的兒子比加在撒瑪利亞作王統治以色列共二十年。

ccb.text: 犹大王亚撒利雅执政第五十二年，利玛利的儿子比加在撒玛利亚登基做以色列王，执政二十年。
